decisions.context: Circular dependency between batchController and batchSync
decisions.decision: Re-implemented snapshot logic in batchSync.js instead of importing batchController functions.
decisions.trade_offs: Slight duplication of logic but ensures reliable utility execution without import loops.

decisions.decision: Migrated to background task returning immediate 202 response.
decisions.trade_offs: Requires user to look at the Activity Center (Inbox) for progress, but prevents UI freeze and timeouts.
